sourceAmbiguity: Public-safe status needs less detail but must not change request meaning.
decisionTaken: Allowed public-safe narrowing of detail while keeping headline, ETA, promise, and recovery posture unchanged.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: Audience coverage governs detail visibility, not canonical status truth.
operationalRisk: Public routes could leak authenticated-only content if copy is duplicated manually.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Keep suppressed field checks in the parity validator and Playwright coverage.
